records.description: Microsoft Copilot is available to Iowa State faculty and staff with commercial data protection for university work.
records.howToObtain: Log in to Microsoft Copilot and authenticate with ISU credentials.
records.costToUser: Included in Iowa State's Microsoft license at no additional cost.

evidence.sourceTitle: This artificial intelligence option offers data security - Iowa State University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot is available to all Iowa State faculty and staff, includes commercial data protection, and does not use Iowa State employee data to build the model.
